steps.title: Find the needed verb
steps.content: The sentence says some music can have many valid interpretations. The blank needs a verb showing that Oliveros's compositions can sustain or allow those interpretations.

steps.title: Reject opposing verbs
steps.content: A would mean disproving the interpretations, B would mean leaving them out, and D would mean avoiding them. The only verb that fits the idea of upholding many valid interpretations is "support." The answer is C.
